fields.transparency: Adjusters see the top contributing factors per score; customers whose claims are referred receive the standard investigation notice - wording under legal review.
fields.privacy: PII tokenized before the feature store; narratives minimized before LLM feature extraction; 7-year retention aligned to claims records; no training on customer data outside tenant.

rows.method: Equalized odds across region deciles on holdout year
Counterfactual paraphrase testing on LLM feature
